title: AE-Dark-UI Multi-module
description: The AE-Dark-UI texture  pack for version 1.20 includes certain text and texture corrections
body:
# AE-Dark-UI Multi-module adaptation

## Language

*   [English](#english)
*   中文

***

![AE-Dark-Style](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SkmXWGfh/images/0977d75f3f4f4cf02204e194c9dd411b62acb6b6.png)

### English

The AE-UI texture pack for **version 1.20** includes certain text and texture corrections

We have added AE-Dark-style UIs for a large number of mods, such as **[Farmers' Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod//farmers-delight)**, **[Sophisticated](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-core)**, **[Avaritia](https://modrinth.com/mod/avaritia)**, and so on. The UIs for other mods are currently in the pipeline

### Note

With the assistance of the GTO community, we have specifically adapted for the [GregTech Odyssey](https://gtodyssey.com/)

### Q&A

*   Q: How to use this texture pack.  
    A: Place the resource package at the top of the resource package interface. It has undergone many modifications and is not compatible with other AE UI resource packages

## 中文

适用于**1.20版本**的AE-UI材质包,包含一定文本修正,贴图修正.

为大量模组添加了AE风格的暗色UI,例如: **[农夫乐事](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)**,**[精妙存储](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-core)**,**[无尽贪婪](https://modrinth.com/mod/avaritia)**…,其他mod的UI加紧制作中.

### 注

在GTO社区帮助下,特别针对[GTO整合包](https://gtodyssey.com/)进行适配

### Q&A

*   Q:如何使用本材质包.  
    A:将材质包放在资源包界面最上面,修改过很多内容,与其他AE的UI材质包不兼容

*   [AE2 Wireless Terminal Library(AE2无线终端)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2wtlib)
*   [ProjectE(等价交换)](https://modrinth.com/mod/projecte)

*   [AE2 Import Export Card(AE2输入输出卡)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2-import-export-card),[AE2 Network Analyser(AE网络分析器)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2-network-analyser),[MEGA Cells(MEGA存储单元)](https://modrinth.com/mod/mega-cells),And some other lightweight modules.
*   [Apotheosis(神化)](https://modrinth.com/mod/apotheosis)
